problem.fact: The discriminative instance/goal-region analyzer passes schema and safety gates but finds that action-time visual features do not consistently separate late-rank valid bed candidates from unsafe selector candidates.
problem.failure_mechanism: Repeated same-category candidates receive saturated visual support, and target contrast pairs split between contrast-favored and selector-favored evidence. Therefore visual support, detector score, semantic rank, and candidate-specific support are not sufficient terminal selectors.

allowed_inputs: candidate id, request id, scene key, query, episode key
candidate position and visit position from non-GT artifacts
candidate semantic rank, generated rank, semantic score, support score, positive-support flag
candidate-specific detector/SAM2/depth support counts and best box score
candidate role from non-GT planner artifact such as source top, nearest spatial rival, nearest higher-score rival, nearest positive-support rival, and target candidate
pairwise distance, visit distance, rank delta, visual-support delta, and coarse region proxy derived from action rows
local neighborhood density, spatial component id, nearest-neighbor profile, and co-visibility proxy computed only from non-GT candidate geometry and observation metadata
forbidden_action_inputs: GT room id or GT scene graph relation
post-join evaluation rows before action rows are written

required_diagnostic_tasks.name: spatial_context_cluster_profile
required_diagnostic_tasks.purpose: Build action-time local context groups from candidate positions, visit positions, and non-GT planner roles before any correctness labels are joined.

required_diagnostic_tasks.name: relation_to_selector_and_anchor_profile
required_diagnostic_tasks.purpose: Test whether unsafe selector candidates and late-rank contrast candidates occupy distinguishable relation/spatial contexts relative to source-top, nearest spatial rival, higher-score rival, and positive-support anchors.

required_diagnostic_tasks.name: evaluation_only_context_separability_probe
required_diagnostic_tasks.purpose: Join correctness labels only after action-time context rows exist and report whether correct late-rank candidates share a context pattern that unsafe selectors lack.

required_diagnostic_tasks.name: next_evidence_requirement
required_diagnostic_tasks.purpose: Choose the next nonterminal action after relation/spatial context analysis.

interpretation_rule.fact: The discriminative analyzer already materialized action-time candidate and pair rows, and its post-label analysis shows visual separability is negative on the recovered-row diagnostic.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The next analyzer should ask whether relation/spatial context explains the selector failure mechanism. If it cannot, the branch should remain deferred or request richer scene-graph/object-relation evidence rather than tuning visual thresholds.
interpretation_rule.user_decision_needed: None for this contract. User judgment is needed only if scene-graph relation extraction should become a separate Docker image or a later paper-scale branch.
